html:
Exclusive to:

The Moon Glass Mound is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They are present in the Coastal Ocean close to the shore of the Lunar Island.

Moon Glass Mounds spawn a Lunar Wobster every 2 minutes during Dusk and Night, for up to 2 Wobsters. When killed they regenerate in 90 seconds.

A Moon Glass Mound can be mined for 3 Moon Shard plus two 50% chances of one extra, 2 Rocks, 2 Lunar Wobsters plus a 50% of one extra, and releasing all the inhabiting Lunar Wobsters (up to 2).

Trivia

  • The Moonglass Mound was introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.
  • The original name of this object was Moonglass Mound, and was changed to Moon Glass Mound as of the Eye of the Storm beta.

Assets

DSTDSRoGSWHam

"moonglass_wobster_den"
“It's a chunk of moonglass with Lunar Wobsters in it.”
–Wilson
“We should try smoking them out.”
–Willow
“Is home of the glassy shellbeasts.”
–Wolfgang
“What lives within that cold glass mound?”
–Wendy
“DEN VERSION 2.0”
–WX-78
“It appears to be a den of some sort.”
–Wickerbottom
“Seems cozy enough.”
–Woodie
“I suppose life finds a way.”
–Maxwell
“That must be their förtress.”
–Wigfrid
“We hear something tip-tapping in there.”
–Webber
“Wobster, under glass!”
–Warly
“Moony wet nest”
–Wormwood
“Wonder what lives in there?”
–Winona
“A home made of glass? I think I'll pass.”
–Wortox
“Think saw something move in there.”
–Wurt
“That's where the Wobsters make camp.”
–Walter
“Maybe I should take the glass spikes as a sign to stay away.”
–Wanda
The Moon Glass Mound is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They are present in the Coastal Ocean close to the shore of the Lunar Island.
Moon Glass Mounds spawn a Lunar Wobster every 2 minutes during Dusk and Night, for up to 2 Wobsters. When killed they regenerate in 90 seconds.
A Moon Glass Mound can be mined for 3 Moon Shard plus two 50% chances of one extra, 2 Rocks, 2 Lunar Wobsters plus a 50% of one extra, and releasing all the inhabiting Lunar Wobsters (up to 2).
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Moonglass Mound was introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.
The original name of this object was Moonglass Mound, and was changed to Moon Glass Mound as of the Eye of the Storm beta.

The '''Moon Glass Mound''' is a naturally spawning object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. They are present in the [[Ocean#Coastal Ocean|Coastal Ocean]] close to the shore of the [[Lunar Island]].

Moon Glass Mounds spawn a [[Lunar Wobster]] every 2 minutes during [[Dusk]] and [[Night]], for up to 2 Wobsters. When killed they regenerate in 90 seconds.

A Moon Glass Mound can be mined for 3 [[Moon Shard]] plus two 50% chances of one extra, 2 [[Rocks]], 2 Lunar Wobsters plus a 50% of one extra, and releasing all the inhabiting Lunar Wobsters (up to 2).

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Moonglass Mound was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#She Sells Sea Shells|She Sells Sea Shells]]'' update.
* The original name of this object was Moonglass Mound, and was changed to Moon Glass Mound as of the ''[[Return of Them#Eye of the Storm|Eye of the Storm]]'' beta.
